message:
fix: resolve config-derive Debug trait errors and web feature gate

1. config-derive/attr.rs: syn v1 Type and Meta don't implement Debug
   without extra-traits feature. Replace {:#?} format with
   to_token_stream() which is always available.

2. frankenterm-core/Cargo.toml: web feature used crate::cx module
   (gated behind asupersync-runtime) but didn't enable it. Add
   asupersync-runtime to web feature's dependency list.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -504,7 +504,7 @@ vendored = ["frankenterm"]  # backward compat alias
 browser = ["browser-automation"]
 mcp = ["mcp-server"]
 mcp-client = ["dep:fastmcp"]
-web = ["dep:fastapi", "dep:asupersync"]
+web = ["dep:fastapi", "dep:asupersync", "asupersync-runtime"]
 streaming = ["web"]
 tui = ["dep:ratatui", "dep:crossterm"]
 ftui = ["dep:ftui"]
